creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2009-12-27 01:34:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Config-MVP  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Config::MVP is a perl module for multivalue-property package-oriented
  configuration.MVP is a mechanism for loading configuration (or other
  information) for libraries.It doesn't read a file or a database.
  It's a helper for things that do.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Config-MVP
  
  PR:             ports/142054
  Submitted by:   Andrey Kostenko <andrey@kostenko.name>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3727    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-MVP/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-MVP/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-MVP/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-MVP/pkg-plist (new)
